claims: The skill requests Telegram bot permissions that are excessive for its primary purpose of sending voice messages. While "send messages" and "send media" are necessary, permissions like "delete messages", "edit group info", "restrict members", "ban members", and "add admins" are unrelated to voice message generation and transmission. These moderation-level permissions could enable actions far beyond the stated purpose of converting text to speech and delivering it to groups.
